name: Chicken Stew Provencal
recipeIngredient: 3 quarts Mixed root vegetables (parsnips, turnips, new potatoes, onions, baby carrots)
1 cup Fresh green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 1/2 pounds Boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
(parsnips, turnips, new potatoes, onions, baby carrots, cut into 1-inch chunks)
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Spray a large, heavy nonstick roasting pan with olive oil cooking spray.
3. Add root vegetables, vinegar, 2 teaspoons tarragon, half teaspoon thyme, garlic, salt, and pepper; toss to coat.
4. Bake until vegetables begin to caramelize, about 30 to 45 minutes.
5. Add green beans and bake until vegetables are tender, about 10 to 15 minutes longer.
6. Remove vegetables to a large bowl; cover to keep warm.
7. Add wine to pan, scraping brown bits off the bottom.
8. Add chicken; bake until thoroughly cooked, about 15 to 20 minutes.
9. Add flour mixture to pan; stir constantly until smooth.
10. Add remaining tarragon and thyme.
11. Return vegetables and chicken to pan; toss to coat evenly.
12. Heat through. Makes 6 servings.
